programme.title: On the road
programme.desc: Hundreds of women operate as sex workers along the Strada Bonifica, the ironically named ‘road of love' on the Adriatic coast of Italy. There has been a huge increase in the number of Nigerian women working along the 10-mile stretch of road – some of whom have been trafficked into the country and forced into prostitution. The film moves between the women's stories, the Italians who live and work there and the local NGO, named On the Road, attempting to support the women

programme.title: Dallas Detective agency | Why journalists carry guns in the Philippines
programme.desc: Dallas Detective agency | Why journalists carry guns in the Philippines

programme.title: Globalised slavery: how big supermarkets are selling prawns in supply chain fed by slave labour
programme.desc: A six-month Guardian multimedia investigation has, for the first time, tracked how some of the world's big-supermakets, Tesco, Aldi, Walmart and Morrisons, are using suppliers relying on slave labour to put cheap prawns on their shelves. Slavery is back and here's the proof. Narrated by Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: Italian mafia's cocaine trafficking leaves trail of drug devastation among poor of Brazil
programme.desc: The all-powerful Calabrian crime syndicate 'Ndrangheta has forged a deadly network of drug trafficking routes through Brazil – 80% of all cocaine arriving in Europe comes through the country's Santos port. To mark International Day against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking, we hear from the anti-'Ndrangheta experts risking their lives to speak out against the syndicate, and take to the streets of Brazil's Crackolândia districts, where crack addiction is destroying lives.

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: Someone Else's War
programme.desc: To date at least 20 British nationals, some with no previous experience of combat, have travelled to Syria to fight Isis on the frontline. Eight of these Brits have lost their lives. This film follows the journeys of parents as they investigate why their children went to join the Kurdish army in their fight against Isis. What led these young Brits to risk everything, travelling thousands of miles from home to wage war against the world's most feared terrorist organisation?

programme.title: Black Sheep
programme.desc: Black Sheep tells the story of Cornelius Walker, whose life changed on 27 November 2000 - the day Damilola Taylor was killed. Damilola was 10, the same age as Cornelius. He lived five minutes away. He had the same skin colour. Cornelius's mother, scared for her son's safety, moved their family out of London. Cornelius suddenly found himself living on a white estate run by racists. But rather than fight them, Cornelius decided to become more like the people who hated him.

programme.title: "I want to bring up a warrior": Ukraine's far-right children's camp
programme.desc: In Ukraine, the far-right Azov militia is fighting on the frontline – and running a summer camp for children. The Guardian visited the camp and followed 16-year-old Anton through his experiences. Is Azov really a modern Hitler Youth organisation, or is it trying to prepare young Ukrainians for the tough reality that awaits them?

programme.title: The foreign domestic staff living a life of five-star serfdom in London | Isis has my kids
programme.desc: I was just a slave: the foreign domestic staff living a life of five-star serfdom in London | Isis has my kids: I won't stop till I get them home to the US

programme.title: The 'Lost Rambos' of Papua New Guinea: how weapons and Hollywood changed tribal disputes
programme.desc: Tribal fighting has long been present in the Papua New Guinea highlands but the influx of modern automatic weaponry in the 1990s turned local disputes into lethal exchanges that threatened to permanently reshape highlands culture. Bootleg copies of the US film Rambo circulated in remote communities, becoming a crude tutorial on the use of such weaponry. The film's influence was so pronounced that the term Rambo is used in Papuan dialects to describe hired mercenaries.

programme.title: He died sitting on our front porch: the fight to stop Chicago's gang killings
programme.desc: Over the Fourth of July weekend, over 100 people were shot in Chicago – a worrying increase after the city's murder rate had fallen to its lowest level in 40 years. Adam Gabbatt visits the city's south side to understand why gang violence remains such a problem – and how grassroots groups are working to prevent it

programme.title: The Breadmaker: Venezuelan activists fighting to feed a community
programme.desc: Natalia Molina and other members of La Minka, a Chavista collective, run a revolutionary bakery in the Venezuelan capital. They have been occupying the shop in Caracas since March 2017 in an attempt to provide their local community with affordable food.

programme.title: World Cup Slaves
programme.desc: Nepalese men employed in Qatar's construction industry tell Robert Booth how they work for little or no pay as they build the infrastructure ahead of the 2022 football World Cup. Appalling living conditions and unsafe employment are not the only difficulties they face: there is pressure and disbelief from families in Nepal when no money is sent back home

programme.title: Killing Gävle
programme.desc: In the small city of Gävle, northern Sweden, there is an annual fight between local custodians and mischievous pagans for the spirit of Christmas. Each year since 1966, business owners have paid for a 13-metre (40ft) effigy of a goat to be made of straw and displayed in the central square from the first day of Advent. In 37 of those years, the goat has been burned down or damaged by shadowy outsiders, sometimes within a few hours of going up.

programme.title: The Battle for Myanmar's Buddhist spirit
programme.desc: In Myanmar, different groups of Buddhist monks are battling with how to deal with the country's minority Muslim population. While some advocate peace, others, such as the extremist Ma Ba Tha, are stoking up hatred and violence. The Guardian visited Myanmar to investigate how the monks' actions are threatening to destabilise the country's newly established democracy

programme.title: Inside Out: Indigenous imprisonment in Australia
programme.desc: Filmed on the plains of north-western New South Wales, this documentary looks at one man's fight against the scourge of Indigenous imprisonment in his community. Inside Out tells the story of a pastor and former prison guard, Uncle Isaac Gordon, whose dream is to see the numbers of Aboriginal youths heading to jail slashed. Gordon wants to build a 'healing centre' for troubled Aboriginal young people at risk of jail time, built on his family's ancestral land near the towns of Brewarrina and Walgett. But will government bodies get on board?

programme.title: Life in the Arctic | The poets taking on climate change
programme.desc: Life in the Arctic: how climate change is killing a culture | High ice and hard truth: the poets taking on climate change

programme.title: Lord of the Rain: one man's fight against climate catastrophe
programme.desc: Doyte lives in South Omo, Ethiopia, one of the most remote areas in the world and hard hit by the climate crisis. As Lord of the Rain, it's Doyte's job to summon the rains, but for five years they haven't come. Ethiopia's economy is booming, fuelled by green power and climate-resilient policies. But neither the government, nor Doyte, can reverse the catastrophic change that's devastating their environment

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: When Lacey starts up an 'Employee of the Month' program at The Ruby, Wanda tries to do the same.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Hospies - Johnny and Stevie attend the regional hospitality awards, while Moira does everything in her power to stop Alexis from auditioning for Cabaret.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Factual. Tracking technology reveals where stolen items are taken. Two bicycles stolen in London are traced to the East End, where one is seemingly sold to an innocent member of the public.

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Factual. Tracking technology reveals where stolen items are taken. A smartphone is stolen outside a bustling city centre cafe and disappears into the backstreets of Soho.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: One of Britain's largest ever drug seizures leads to a Proceeds of Crime auction, and elite financial investigators hunt down suspected drug dealers.

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: Inside the Mind
programme.desc: Israel Keyes killed complete strangers. He would fly thousands of miles to randomly pick his victims. He was captured after abducting one of his victims and the cctv footage was released to the media. Absent of any apparent motive, the Police just don't know where to start, which Keyes knew.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When the downtown church of Nate's former priest – and childhood best friend – is about to be razed by a profiteering real estate developer, the Leverage team must steal a miracle in order to save it. But as the story progresses, the question becomes: "who exactly is saving whom?"

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: Factual. Hi-tech tracking technology reveals where stolen items are taken. A DVD player is stolen from a donation bag outside a London charity shop, and the tracking data reveals that the thief lives nearby.

programme.title: York
programme.desc: In medieval England, the North was ruled from York. Dan Jones explores the history of its castle, from the Viking Jorvik and the Normans, through the dark days of the anti-Jewish pogrom and the imprisonment of the Knights Templar, to one of its most colourful inmates - the legendary highwayman Dick Turpin.

programme.title: Leeds
programme.desc: With the aid of dramatic reconstruction, Dan Jones explores the 900-year history of the beautiful Leeds Castle in Kent.

programme.title: Lancaster
programme.desc: Dan Jones visits Lancaster Castle to explore its grisly history of crime and punishment, including the infamous Lancashire Witches trials and the martyrdom of the Jesuit priest Saint Edmund Arrowsmith.

programme.title: Arundel
programme.desc: Dan takes a look behind the Arundel Castle and the infamous Earls of Arundel. He examines how its knights would've fought in the Hundred Years' War, as well as how they would've prepared the castle for Queen Victoria's visit in 1846.

programme.title: Edinburgh
programme.desc: Edinburgh's handsome hilltop bastion is Scotland's most popular paid tourist attraction. With a slew of sieges to its name, it is no surprise that the site boasts some formidable defences.

programme.title: Cardiff
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Cardiff castle over more than 2,000 years and reveals how it became transformed from a strategically important Roman and Norman stronghold to a lavish fairy-tale Victorian home.

programme.title: Hobbit, Limb Generation, Mind Over Matter, The
programme.desc: A look at the future of mind control, a extinct hobbit race and whether humans can regenerate our limbs.

programme.title: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine biologists discover a gruesome underwater dead zone, a mysterious aircraft flies through the Chilean skies, ghostly columns of light tower above Norway and apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador.

programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

The recruits are tasked with cooking a dish and performing a flashy tableside demonstration for their guests. After, Anne and Tyler decide which recruits will represent them in next week's finale for a chance to win $25,000.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America

Anne and Tyler coach their recruits from the sidelines, but it all comes down to the skills that the recruits have learned over the past 10 weeks. Judges Paulette Gotto, Jordan Andino and Michael Chernow taste the recruits' dishes in a blind taste test and determine the winner of the $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Lap of Luxury

programme.title: Evolving Earth
programme.desc: Philippe travels to Utah where scientists have discovered a massive amount of dinosaur bones and explores an area where dinosaur footprints have been preserved. Then he visits Hawaii to see how the island chain evolved from volcanoes and tours an old coal mine in Pennsylvania to see how fossil fuels are formed.

programme.title: Extinction Earth
programme.desc: Philippe explores Yellowstone National Park, the site of a potential super-volcano visits Meteor Crater in Arizona, the site where a meteor once struck 50,000 years ago and travels to the Hawaiian Island of Maui, where powerful telescopes search the universe for meteors that might be heading our way.

programme.title: Forests
programme.desc: Philippe looks at ways scientists are measuring the health of our forests. In New England, he visits a white pine forest that is being threatened by invasive plants. At the University of California Santa Cruz, he discovers how students are using sonic-tomography to look inside trees to detect signs of disease. At the Pine Barrens of New Jersey, he discovers why the pitch pine tree is able to withstand occasional wildfires. And in Los Angeles, he discovers how volunteers are planting trees to create an urban forest.

We give you five reasons to visit the European paradise.

programme.title: Landmarks Wadi Rum, Jordan
programme.desc: Set on a high plateau at the western edge of the Arabian desert, Wadi Rum in Jordan is a surreal world of sweeping red sand dunes and towering sandstone arches. From the ancient petroglyphs found here to the Bedouin nomads who still call this mystical realm home, it is a place that offers a rare window into humanity's earliest beginnings.

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Led by a new member, Team Prime launches a desperate assault on the Decepticon citadel.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots adjust to new group dynamics within their expanded lineup.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: As tension builds within the Wreckers, they find themselves confronted with the return of the Predacon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal underground.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice to convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Arcee is reunited with an old friend, and together they uncover a Decepticon plotengineered by Shockwave.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream goes on a quest for Red Energon while a new Autobot joins Team Prime: but is he what he seems?

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Silas is given a bizarre new lease on life, and approaches Megatron with a plan to join the Decepticon ranks.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Jack pairs off with Smokescreen to further educate him about navigating the human world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots learn of the Omega Keys and the incredible secret they hold.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The race for the Omega Keys grows more desperate.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the Decepticons take him captive, Smokescreen learns of the location of thefinal Omega Key.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream proposes a truce to Megatron, but Dreadwing threatens to stand in the way of his return.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream, Lugnut and Blitzwing begin their invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Mutiny On The Smurf: King Symphonium sends his pelican, Satchelmouth, to scoop up Brainy's orchestra and carry them to his island. Dreamy takes the helm of a ship to set sail for their rescue. When Dreamy gets seasick, Brainy takes command and leads the rescue party that frees the captured Smurfs.

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Time Capsule: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Springtime: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Handy's Sweetheart: Handy learns it's better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: Foul Weather Smurf
programme.desc: Handy invents a weather machine that will allow the Smurfs to control their environment at will. Unfortunately, they cannot agree on whether it should rain or be sunny so the machine overloads and explodes.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Heart: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: Futuresmurfed
programme.desc: Balthazar the Enchanter is a man of vision. He knows that the times of alchemy are drawing to their end. The future belongs to those who will understand science...but how can he see into the future? Perhaps by kidnapping Father Time. The Smurfs will help to put things right after Little Thunder, a dinosaur, escapes through a gash in the fabric of time.

programme.title: Heart Of Gold
programme.desc: Whatever Brainy Smurf says, the Clockwork Smurf devised by Handy has feelings just like any normal blue Smurf. At least it seems to be so until Clockwork Smurf loses what Handy had fitted inside its ribcage: a heart of gold. When the evil wizard Gargamel and his apprentice Scruple find the tiny contraption and fit it with a heart of stone, the Smurfs are in for a bad time...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette: Snappy and Nat steal Gargamel's formula to make another Smurf – a female to be a companion to Smurfette. They create Sassette, who causes mischief wherever she goes. Papa uses his Smurfiness Solution to turn Gargamel's evil Sassette into a playful Smurfy Sassette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Golden Smurf Award: Hogatha disguises herself as the Golden Smurf Award to catch the Smurfs in order to use them as the main ingredient in her beauty cream. Vanity convinces her to try his recipe and before long, the wicked sorceress is covered with mud and sent careening over the hills into Gargamel's house.

programme.title: Queen Smurfette
programme.desc: Smurfette becomes Queen for a day on her birthday. But this gets out of hand when Father Time falls asleep, neglecting to end the days. Tempers begin to flare among the Smurfs, who are tired of servitude. Papa rushes to wake Father Time and brings peace again to Smurfland.

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Sarah, Fraser & the Ducks
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for the Teletubbies. The Teletubbies watch some children feeding the ducks. Po finds a new trick to play with Tubby Toast. Three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Seesaw Margery Daw
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children dancing while King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys play 'See Saw Majory Daw'. Po has fun going up and down the slide. The Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Shadows
programme.desc: Po looks after the Teletubbies' favourite things. The Teletubbies have fun watching some children making shadows.

programme.title: Sophie Art
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun sliding down into Home Hill. They watch some children painting circus pictures before the Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Squirrels
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children go for a walk to find some red squirrels. The Teletubbies are playing a hiding game. Where are they? Can Noo-Noo find them?

programme.title: Stop & Go
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies play a round and round game. They watch some children playing stop and go. Then they play a Ready, Steady, Go game round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Strawberry Picking
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having some Tubby Custard when they stop to watch some children who are going strawberry picking.

programme.title: Swan
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have trouble getting out of bed. The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children feeding swans.

programme.title: Swim with Stephanie
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun falling over. The Teletubbies watch some children go swimming with Stephanie.

programme.title: The Beach
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a magical sound for the Teletubbies. The Teletubbies watch some children take their dog and a ball to the beach.

programme.title: Throwing
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to run and do exercises. The Tubbies watch a girl and a boy throwing a ball. Then they play a game together with the ball.

programme.title: Tweet Tweet
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having their Tubby Toast when a voice trumpet brings them a message. The Teletubbies watch Alex Pascall and some children go looking for birds in the park.

programme.title: Urban Birds
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children feed some birds and watch them playing on the bird table. In Teletubbyland, it's timer for Tubby Custard, but Dipsy spills his all over a Tubby Seat. No-one wants to sit in the Tubby Custard, so Noo-Noo tidies it up.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: The very dissimilar Cheer and Grumpy must join forces for an important treasure hunt.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Hannah must overcome her fear of sleeping away from home to help Wonderheart earn her Care Camper badge.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: The Care Bear Cousins return to Care-a-Lot and showcase their lessons in Care Hearts.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Tenderheart and Wonderheart are split away from each other when Wonderheart splits away from home.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Beastly steals the Cousins' ship, and it's up to Brave Heart Raccoon to save it and the Share Cloud.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: After building a Snack Shack, The Cousins and the Bears end up completing to see who's shack is the best.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Beastly attempts to ruin the Belly Badge Bonanza after being left out of the events.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Wonderheart's Belly Badge Power has unleashed itself, and the Cousins wonder when it's needed the most.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: A jealous Harmony attempts to get back at her friend, Share Bear when she starts playing with someone else.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Lotsa Heart Elephant accidentally causes a night-time problem when one of Wish Bear's Wishes goes wrong.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Beave Heart Lion tries to have fun with two friends at the same time, but it's more trouble than he thought.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Harmony makes a new song, which Cheer shares to the whole of Care-a-Lot before it's finished.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Lotsa-Heart Elephant accidentally injures Grumpy, and attempts to heal him.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Beastly and Share have trouble operating snack bars right next to each other.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Share breaks Grumpy's Cloud Express invention and tries to hide that she did it.

programme.title: The Skeleton's Compass
programme.desc: A group of middle school friends go on the hunt for treasure after finding a skeleton in the woods.

programme.title: Ladybug
programme.desc: Uplifting and moving family fun! Courageous seven-spotted ladybug Rube escapes his laboratory home and scales new heights on a quest for the legendary bug utopia Golden Canyon, with the help of worldly dragonfly Master Water. However, on arriving at Golden Canyon, he is dismayed to find it's a construction site! Rube and his new friends must band together to re-build their magical homeland. A heart-warming, magical tale of courage, hope and friendship.

programme.title: Felix and the Hidden Treasure
programme.desc: Convinced that his father, who disappeared at sea two years ago, is still alive, 12-year-old Felix embarks on a search for him in the company of Old Tom, a retired fisherman Squawk, a thieving one-legged parrot and Rover, a cat who acts like a dog. Their journey takes them to Darkshadow Island, where a secret community inhabits an underground city, ruled by the megalomaniacal Morgäa, possessor of a priceless treasure.

programme.title: Dreambuilders
programme.desc: Inside Out meets Monsters Inc. DREAMBUILDERS is a Pixar-esque movie full of heart and magic as we follow a young girl who can control dreams. From the animation team behind Big Hero 6 and Sherlock Holmes, this beautiful and mesmerising animation explores the world behind dreams in which the dreambuilders create our imaginations on stage. A story full of heart and magic that the whole family will love.

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Buddy's got a new trick up his paw – football. When Buddy's owner suddenly becomes his school's next quarterback, Buddy falls in with the huddle as well! The dynamite pairing of Buddy and Josh help carry the Timberwolves to the state championship. All is well until two wicked Russian circus owners show up to dognap Buddy to be their star attraction. A movie that is a touchdown for the entire family!

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: The Rabbids are arguing.
programme.desc: A Rabbid sticks a fake nose on his face, that changes the sound of his voice.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids are fed up!
programme.desc: Amazed by a dog scratching himself, the Rabbids approach him, and get the dog's fleas.

programme.title: The Rabbids are causing a stir
programme.desc: Two Rabbids fall asleep on an abandoned couch.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: The Rabbids are lost
