programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies - The DVD: Tom Thomas has to return a DVD he borrowed from his friend but discovers his player can't read the disk anymore. Simka and Nolik help Tom Thomas clean it so it works again.

programme.title: PopPixie
programme.desc: PopPixie - GREEN ATTACK: Pam is worried because she still hasn't found out which is her talent that will enable her to become a PopPixie. As Ninfea and her friends encourages her, a carnivorous plant invades Pixieville.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.desc: The New Adventures of Peter Pan - Teamwork of the People: Part 2 of 5: When Synapse threatens to spray Captain Muscles with a serum that will exacerbate his faults, Sienna, caught up in the film, falls and causes a magical short-circuit.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.desc: The New Adventures of Peter Pan - Teamwork of the People: Part 3 of 5: The potion and Captain Muscles cross through the screen. Hit by the serum, Sienna writhes around and then flees into the forest, growling.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E5
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E6
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E1
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E2
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E3
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E4
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E5
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E6
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E7
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E8
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E9
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E10
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E11
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E12
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E13
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E14
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E15
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: When Rekkit tries swimming in the lake, he becomes so scared of water that he gathers up the town's whole water supply in his magic bucket and pours it into a painting.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is a cheeky, charming penguin who finds himself in comical situations in his snowy world!

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: Packed with incredible facts about the human body, Dr Chris and Dr Xand van Tulleken experiment and explore their way through the fascinating world of medicine and biology.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Science Max
programme.desc: Have you ever done a science experiment and wondered “What would this be like if it were HUGE?” - Welcome to Science Max, the exciting series that turbocharges science experiments.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: Grojband follows the story of a band of the same name formed by Corey Riffin as they work together to propel their band to international stardom.

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: We don't know where they came from. We don't know how they got here. But we do know this: they're here to play!

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: When Polly inherits a magic locket that allows her to shrink to four inches tall, she embraces her pocket-sized powers and finds the upside of shrinking is big fun!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V!: Battle Fields
programme.desc: Its time for a nail-biting battle royal in the ARC League Championship! With four battle zones to choose from, the action has never been more mesmerizing or the duels more dangerous!

programme.title: Zenon the Farmer: Where is the Baby Chick?
programme.desc: Enjoy, dance, sing and learn with Zenon the Farmer's best songs.

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon: Waking Up the Good Eye? / Sand Castle
programme.desc: Mom says that Andy does not have a good eye. But neither Mandy nor Andy know what this good eye is. Tommy the Dragon is well acquainted with it. / Mandy enjoys building sandcastles, but Andy loves crushing them!

programme.title: Origanimals
programme.desc: Help a Flightless Cormorant Realize his Dream of Flying. Where there's a will, there's a way.

programme.title: Origanimals
programme.desc: Help a black caiman to make friends with other animals who are frightened of him. One shouldn't judge based on appearances alone.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The brothers come across a lone baby elephant and bring him back to the Tortuga HQ for safety until they can find his mom. But they learn how mischievous baby elephants can be and get more than they bargained for when it almost destroys the Tortuga! As they rush to get the baby elephant home, the WildKratts team realizes that animals have different structures that serve various functions in growth and survival. And an elephant's trunk is like the multipurpose tool of "creature features" with hundreds of uses, including: showering, blasting water, grabbing, lifting, communicating, "hearing", pushing and pulling.

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: In this awesome episode of T-Rex Ranch, Park ranger Darren accidentally gets hit with a sleepy dart!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: Welcome to dinosaur school where the park rangers are learning all about the different dinos when they hear that a trespasser has entered the park!

programme.title: Mirette Investigates: The River Thames Monster / Royal Rendezvous
programme.desc: A giant creature looms up out of the Thames in London! / Mirette and Jean-Patt meet the Queen of England for the first time. But the Queen and Jean-Pat are brainwashed and suddenly want to give away e

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash: Betty's Tomato Truck / Gus's Garbage Truck / Tony's Taxi Cab
programme.desc: When Betty's tomato truck hits a bump in the road, her truck becomes a tomato-y mess! So, she floors it to Carl's Car Wash where Carl goes through his three-point checklist and decides her tomato truck needs medium messy treatment. Betty pays five tokens and heads into the car wash. She leaves all tidied up! / Gus the Garbage Truck driver is doing a dumpster pickup when SPLAT, the trash lands all over his truck. What a stinky mess! Gus swings over to Carl's Car Wash, where Carl goes through his evaluation process and decides that Gus's truck a big garbage salad with a side of stink! So, Gus pays seven tokens and drives into the car wash. He rolls out sparkling clean. His truck never looked so good! / After Tony drops Ivan off, Fiona's Fire Truck zooms by and splashes mud all over Tony's Taxi! Tony needs to get cleaned up fast – time is money! After a quick vehicle evaluation, Tony counts 10 tokens and drops them into the machine deposit. He rolls into the car wash and gets his taxi all tidied up! Carl gives Tony a tip – to stay away from puddles. Tony drives away, one happy customer!

programme.title: Dino Ranch Shorts: Dino Ranchers Fly & more!
programme.desc: Nursery rhyme 'Dino Ranchers Fly', 'Dinosaur Dinosaur', Light Touch Tango', & 'Tangos Dancing Song' music videos from the hit TV show, Dino Ranch.

programme.title: Science Max: Earthquake-Proof
programme.desc: Phil tries to build a tower strong enough to not fall apart when shaken in a massive earthquake.

programme.title: Hero 108: The Rise of Lin Chung
programme.desc: During a time of great doubt, Lin Chung is reunited with his martial arts master. Now in spectral form, Tien Khuan gives Lin Chung three fighting tasks.

programme.title: Hero 108: The Rise of Lin Chung
programme.desc: Lin Chung's Harmonic Energy comes in handy when he's pitted against Hidden Kingdom's most powerful enemy. TwinMasters, a terrifying force of chaos incarnate, is a foe bent on bringing First Squad to i

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid: Climb, Ignatz, Climb!
programme.desc: Sid pretends that his stuffed animal panda is going on an adventure to the top of the playground slide. Sid and his friends make a plan and use simple machines like wheels, inclined planes, levers and pulleys to get the panda all the way to the top of the slide!

programme.title: Sing Along With Tobee: Hello Hello / One Little Finger / Skidamarink
programme.desc: Welcome to Sing Along With Tobee! In this very first episode, Tobee and Caitie teach you a super simple hello song! Join them each episode as they sing and dance to classic nursery rhymes and kids songs. / Caitie and Tobee sing one of their favorite kids songs, One Little Finger. It's super simple and super fun. It's also great for learning new parts of the body vocabulary! / Tobee makes a card for his dad's birthday but he wants to give him something else. So Caitie teaches him Skidamarink, the perfect song to sing on a birthday, Valentine's Day, Father's Day, Mother's Day, or any other day you'd like to tell someone how special they are!

programme.title: Mr. Mender and the Chummyjiggers: Thank You Scribblies
programme.desc: The Chummies learn how to say thank you to the scribblies.

programme.title: Cry Babies Magic Tears: The booger ghost Part 1 / The booger ghost Part 2
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Magic Tears World! The babies find a spell book and decide to cast one for the Booger Ghost to appear, but it doesn't seem to work. Although... what is that sticky thing on the floor

programme.title: Orange Moo-Cow: Happy Moo Year / To The North Pole
programme.desc: The Cow family prepares for New Year celebration and Granny's and Grandpa's arrival. / It's winter time. In their country house Boh and Zoh get a postcard from their Granny and Grandpa from the North Pole. Boh gets an idea to have an expedition to the North Pole. He gets ready for it – he exercises, runs cross country.

programme.title: Lucas The Spider: Lonesome Lucas / I Can't See You
programme.desc: Lucas wakes up in the middle of the night. How long can a night alone last? / Lucas tries to beat Bodhi at Hide and Seek.

programme.title: Peep and the Big Wide World: Tree Feller
programme.desc: Exciting news! Beaver Boy is ready to cut down his first tree. Come one, come all! Don't forget your hard hats!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: Starting Over
programme.desc: On paper, Bill can't complain. With a secure job and long-term marriage to wife Jess, life seems pretty steady. However, when Bill becomes suspicious of Jess's fidelity, things rapidly unravel. Realising his career is in a slump and his marriage is falling apart, Bill's fortunes change when he begins tutoring self-assured teenager who, it turns out, has far more to teach him about life than appearances would suggest. And then, Bill meets Lucy and his world is turned upside down all over again…

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Struggling family man Craig loses his low-wage job and is threatened with eviction. In an effort to delay facing the music at home, he heads to a local bar and encounters an old friend. The two friends are roped into a round of drinks by charismatic and obscenely wealthy strangers. The couple engages the two friends in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but the couple's twisted sense of humor pushes just how far Craig and his friend are willing to go for money and cheap thrills.

programme.title: Switched
programme.desc: Tired of being bullied, Cassandra Evans prays that her nemesis, Katie Sharp, the queen bee of social media, would know what it's like to walk a day in her shoes. Her prayer is answered in an unexpected way when they get "Switched."

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

programme.title: 30 Days Of Night
programme.desc: Barrow, Alaska: A remote, isolated town that is plunged into a state of complete darkness for 30 days every winter. It is here that a group of marauding, merciless and bloodthirsty vampires, led by Marlow (Danny Huston), are coming. Their intention? A month long, uninterrupted feast of its helpless residents. It is up to Sheriff Eben (Josh Hartnett), his estranged wife, Stella (Melissa George), and an ever-shrinking group of survivors to do anything and everything they can to last till daylight.

programme.title: The Flowers of War
programme.desc: In 1937, as the invading Japanese Imperial Army overruns China's capital city, desperate civilians seek refuge behind the protective walls of a western cathedral. Here, John Miller (Christian Bale), an American is barricaded with a group of schoolgirls and thirteen courtesans. With nowhere to run and nowhere to hide, fate always has a way of bringing the most unlikely heroes together.

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: From the director of WOLF CREEK comes this terrifying look at nature's perfect killing machine. When a group of tourists stumble into the remote Australian river territory of an enormous crocodile, the deadly creature traps them on a tiny mud island with the tide quickly rising and darkness descending. As the hungry predator closes in, they must fight for survival against all odds. Starring SAM WORTHINGTON (Terminator Salvation, Avatar) RADHA MITCHELL (Silent Hill) and MICHAEL VARTAN (Alias), Rogue delivers intense action and breathless suspense as it speeds towards the intense final showdown.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: After the disappearance of a young scientist on a business trip, his son and wife struggle to cope, only to make a bizarre discovery years later - one that may bring him home.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: A team travels to China to capture a primeval creature that is not supposed to exist.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: Dangerous Mind Of A Hooligan
programme.desc: When the mastermind behind a bank robbery is shot dead on the job - four thieves find themselves caught in a heist which quickly goes wrong. With a hostage in tow and bags of money, the police quickly close in.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Fast Vengeance
programme.desc: Upon hearing of his brother's death, Shannon returns to his old stomping grounds to find the men responsible and take justice into his own hands.

programme.title: The Last Scout
programme.desc: After the earth is destroyed by war, a scout team of astronauts searches the universe for an inhabitable place to save the human race.

programme.title: Sword of the Assassin
programme.desc: His family was wrongly executed by the empress of Vietnam after being framed – now he sets out for justice

programme.title: Closed for Storm
programme.desc: Closed For Storm is a film detailing the incredible history of a massive, American theme park that was eventually left completely abandoned

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla Bennett and Derek Dray are the hosts of Wake Up, Chicago and for the folks at home, their chemistry is undeniable. Derek is incredibly protective about the format of Wakeup, Chicago while Layla is always looking to shake things up. One morning they discover an adorable baby named Poppy left in a basket in Laylas dressing room. The mother passed away and the caretaker is unable to care for Poppy and is convinced that Layla and Derek will make perfect parents.

programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Finding Love in Big Sky
programme.desc: An independent country girl, Paisley, takes on the task of upholding her adored grandfather's ranch. After being denied the funding needed to refurbish the ranch, she is reintroduced to her ex-boyfriend Josh, a big-time marketing executive stationed in Denver who has been suspended from his current position at his company. Admitting to herself that she needs the help, Paisley agrees to work with Josh while he is town to come up with ideas on how to raise money for the farm.

programme.title: Hope Ranch
programme.desc: A young girl has it all—a beautiful ranch, a horse named Faith, and the love of her family. But after the death of her military father, she and her mother are in danger of losing their family ranch too. With a little help from friends and their majestic white horse, they hatch a plan to raise enough money to save the ranch while learning to never lose hope, despite all odds.

programme.title: Dead Aim
programme.desc: A traveling gravedigger during an war adopts a orphan he finds alone in the desert. After the war with the orphan grown and business slow, the orphan begins to generate business himself by shooting people.

programme.title: Alien Thunder
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice (Gordon Tootoosis), a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: Arizona Colt Returns
programme.desc: Famed gunman Arizona Colt is sent by Moreno to rescue his daughter from the grips of Arizona's old enemy, Keane. But certain complications make the mission far more dangerous than expected.

programme.title: Shango
programme.desc: Shango is a Texas Ranger who finds himself up against a former Confederate officer and his gang of thugs who have been terrorizing a local border town in search of gold.

programme.title: Something Big
programme.desc: A man kidnaps the wife of a cavalry commander in order to exchange her for a Gatling gun that's being sold by a gun runner.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: A sexy, modern telling of Jane Austen's "Persuasion." Wren (Alicia Witt: Orange is the New Black) is a happy, single and self-confessed workaholic who, after rising to the top of the corporate ladder, finds herself coming home to her cat every night.

programme.title: Onegin
programme.desc: Eugene Onegin is a jaded and disaffected young man who leaves St. Petersburg unexpectedly when he inherits an estate from a wealthy uncle. Starring: Ralph Fiennes, Liv Tyler, Toby Stephens, Lena Headey, Simon McBurney, Jason Watkins

programme.title: Back To Love
programme.desc: A young widow returns home for the first time in three years to help prepare her sister's wedding. She is forced to confront her past, including the man she never expected to fall for.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: When Jack and Amanda head off on a glamping trip to "reignite their spark", their blissful romantic getaway is rudely hijacked and they are left in more trouble than before!

programme.title: Stonewall
programme.desc: Inspired by the incredible true story of the unsung heroes whose courage broke down walls. A young man's political awakening and coming of age during the days and weeks leading up to the Stonewall Riots.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in London
programme.desc: In the 1930s, organised crime came to England. Two of the most notorious gangsters, Jack ‘Spot' Comer and Billy Hill dominated the London underworld paving the way for the rise of the notorious Kray Twins and The Richardsons in the 1950s.

programme.title: A Romance Wedding
programme.desc: Zoe Davis is a successful and highly driven wedding planner in the big city. When her father asks her for help at the family café shop, she happily drives back to her cozy hometown of Romance, Oregon. Little does she know her mom has already hired Will to help, an aspiring chef and coincidentally...Zoe's childhood sweetheart! Tensions rise between Zoe and Will, but so does the chemistry. Will they settle their differences and find lost love along the way?

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a big breakup, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away. And she doesn't even like yoga! But maybe the universe has put her here for a reason, because the handsome loner staying at the lodge turns out to be Stefan Gonzales, the tech guru at the center of the scandal. As she gains his trust to expose him, she finds herself falling in love with him. Now she must use the lessons from yoga to choose: the perfect story or the perfect man?

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl. With a little nudging from the matchmaking daughter, Sophie and Michael unexpectedly start to fall in love and Sophie must decide between returning home or following her heart.

programme.title: The Big City
programme.desc: Calcutta in the early 1960's. Bhambal supports his wife Arati, his parents, and two children. Money is tight, so Arati goes to work. She's successful and enjoys it, but this untraditional step throws the household into chaos: her in-laws initiate a "cold war" of silence and approbation. When Bhambal loses his job, her working is essential he loses self respect, and the gulf between them widens. Arati questions whether to keep her daughter in school. At work, her friendship with Edith, a Euro-Indian who smokes, swears, and uses lipstick, brings Arati close to impertinence with her genial boss. Her job is imperiled, she acts impulsively, and who will understand her actions?

programme.title: The Blue Angel
programme.desc: An elderly professor's ordered life spins dangerously out of control when he falls for a nightclub singer.

programme.title: The Boat
programme.desc: Buster and his family go on a voyage on his homemade boat that proves to be one disaster after another.

programme.title: The Cabinet Of Dr. Caligari
programme.desc: The most brilliant example of that dark and twisted film movement known as German expressionism, The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari is a plunge into the mind of insanity that severs all ties with the rational world.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chuck Scott gets a job as chauffeur to tough guy Eddie Roman but Chuck's involvement with Eddie's fearful wife becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: Good Time Max
programme.desc: Suspenseful, twisty and starring award-winning James Franco (127 Hours). Meet brothers Adam and Max. Leading a successful medical career, Adam prescribes drugs, while hedonistic Max, deals drugs.

programme.title: Miss Meadows
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Miss Meadows is not entirely what she appears. Well-mannered, sweet, and caring but underneath the candy-sweet exterior hides the soul of a vigilante, taking it upon herself to right the wrongs in this world by whatever means necessary.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: The story of the first major battle of the American phase of the Vietnam War, and the soldiers on both sides that fought it. Feat: Mel Gibson.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: Implanted
programme.desc: Sarah, a struggling young woman living in Brooklyn, agrees to volunteer as an experimental test subject for a pharmaceutical company called Dynamic Health Cure to be implanted with the LEXX nanochip. Sarah hopes that the money received for her participation will solve her financial troubles and help her to take care of her mother who has Alzheimer's. A nanochip is implanted in her cerebral cortex. It is designed with artificial intelligence technology to take control of the body at the inception of any disease or illness. When the implant turns sinister and orders her to commit crimes, Sarah is plunged into a murderous spiral with only one choice: to live or die.

programme.title: The Colony
programme.desc: Set in the distant future, a female astronaut, shipwrecked on the long-decimated Earth, must decide the fate of the wasteland's remaining populace.

programme.title: Eternity
programme.desc: Detective Richard Manning (played by Elliot Travers) is transported into a virtual-reality computer game and tasked with solving a seemingly implausible murder. The more Richard investigates, the more complex the case seems to become. He soon realizes his own future and survival depend on him solving everything - and quickly.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: A Winter Rose: Directors Cut
programme.desc: After being diagnosed with cancer, a legendary singer, her manager and husband discover a gifted but troubled orphan to be her successor.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: JK's House
programme.desc: At JK's House, Dr. Amber Jenkins (Robin Givens) and JK (Jakayla Lawrence) blend family values and life lessons with music and dance.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband. With the help of an insurance investigator and her stepdaughter together they find the real killer.

programme.title: Lucky Number
programme.desc: A young man's life is on a losing streak, until he gets the old cell number of a major basketball star, and starts using it to get VIP access to A-List parties... Until his idol finds out.

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: While on vacation in California, Romy breaks things off once and for all with her boorish husband in a dramatic final fight. A free woman in a strange land, Romy embarks on a life-changing trip through the desert that brings in her touch with strangers who impact her life in various ways: a kindly small town police officer, a pregnant, trailer park-dwelling mother, and a charming, ruggedly independent cowboy with whom she finds the possibility of new love.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: Two mismatched personal trainers' lives are upended by the actions of a new, wealthy client.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: The Age of Innocence
programme.desc: Nominated for five Academy Awards® including a win for Best Costume Design, Martin Scorsese's 1993 adaptation of Edith Wharton's novel is set in the elegant milieu of the oldest and richest families in 1870s New York. Marriages are like treaties between nations, their purpose not to cement romance or produce children, but to provide for the orderly transmission of wealth between the generations.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: When his daughter is kidnapped, a retired assassin is drawn back into the life he gave up.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Live
programme.desc: A former special-ops marine turned mercenary is given one last shot at redemption.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan discovers the people who raised him are not his parents, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets.

programme.title: A Friend of the Family
programme.desc: Allison was unsettled by David's creepy attentions but she was the only one to suspect him of being a monster.

programme.title: Rust Creek
programme.desc: An ambitious woman must summon extraordinary courage to survive a nightmare odyssey in this harrowing survival thriller. Sawyer (Hermione Corfield: Star Wars: The Last Jedi) finds herself facing her own mortality when she ends up stranded in the frozen Kentucky woods. Eventually being forced into an uneasy alliance with Lowell (Jay Paulson: Catch-22), an enigmatic loner with shadowy intentions.

programme.title: Eloise
programme.desc: From the producers of The Exorcism of Emily Rose. Four friends break into an abandoned insane asylum to find a death certificate that could land them a hefty inheritance. While inside they discover the shocking history of the asylum and the terrifying truth about their own pasts. A haunting horror starring Chace Crawford (Gossip Girl) and Eliza Dushku (Bring it On).

programme.title: The Joker
programme.desc: In this creepy and twisted thriller, a young detective is caught in a horrifically sadistic game of cat-and-mouse when he is kidnapped and tormented by a masked, sex-crazed, serial killer. With a deadly race against time, he only has one method to save himself and a young girl. Starring Ron Perlman (Hellboy) and Halston Sage (Bad Neighbours) this clever, nail-biting nightmare is not to be missed!

programme.title: Masters of Love
programme.desc: A funny, moving look at the complications of modern love, starring Edinburgh Festival Best Newcomer Ciarˆn Dowd (Drunk History). A group of friends are at different stages in their relationships and none of them are convinced about what they're doing: Emmy and Samantha are getting married, Josh and Jenifer are breaking up and Niall is sleeping around but can any of them hold down a relationship?

programme.title: Class Rank
programme.desc: From the director of Glee, presenting a coming-of-age drama, in the vein of Easy A and Legally Blonde. Starring Olivia Holt (Cloak & Dagger), Skyler Gisondon (Booksmart), Bruce Dern (The Senator). Two high school outsiders join forces to overtake the local school board. Guided by their families, they enter the perilous world of politics and learn a thing or two about love.

programme.title: Night Hunter
programme.desc: A detective investigating the disappearance of several women gets pulled into a much larger deadly conspiracy. Starring Henry Cavill and Ben Kingsley (2018).

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: The first humans on Mars do what they must to survive the cosmic elements and each other. Starring Jonny Lee Miller (2021)
A desperate man takes part in an underworld game of Russian roulette in which gamblers place bets on who will survive. Starring Jason Statham, Ray Winstone and Mickey Rourke (2010)

programme.title: Hidden Intentions
programme.desc: A woman suspects that something is off about the sudden appearance of her aunt. Starring Ashlynn Yennie (2018)

programme.title: A Focus To Kill
programme.desc: A woman is hired by her ex-boyfriend to manage his fortune. After an affair, she is forced to confront the fact that he may not be the man he once was. Starring Presciliana Esparolini (2018)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: Kyra's dream of becoming a jeweller might come to fruition. Little does she know someone has manifested a life for her too. (2020)

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: Seasoned With Love
programme.desc: Winona's dream of becoming a TV chef is shattered when car breaks down, she seeks refuge in Adam's Inn. In exchange for fixing her car, she will cater for the town's food festival. (2020)

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: Riley and Sarah are from rival family-run pizza restaurants. But their differences are forgotten when a new pizza chain opens in town. Could love be in the air? Stars Megan Elizabeth Barker. (2021)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: Kyra's dream of becoming a jeweller might come to fruition. Little does she know someone has manifested a life for her too. (2020)

programme.title: The Party's Just Beginning
programme.desc: A darkly humorous and moving coming of age story written, directed and starring Karen Gillan. Witty and sarcastic Liusaidh (Karen Gillan) spirals into a reckless, drunken, mid-twenties crisis after the death of her best friend. Unable to connect with anyone, a chance encounter with a stranger from out of town (Lee Pace) changes everything.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: When former CIA agent Ben Logan (Aaron Eckhart - The Dark Knight, Battle: Los Angeles) finds himself suddenly targeted for termination by the Agency, he is propelled into a frenzied, action-packed race against the clock for his life, with the only person left who wants or needs him alive: the 15 year-old daughter he barely knows. Also starring Olga Kurylenko (Quantum of Solace), The Expatriate is a stylish, cleverly plotted, non-stop espionage thriller that weighs an international conspiracy against personal honour and the bonds of family.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: 3 GENERATIONS tells the stirring and touching story of three generations of a family living under one roof in New York as they must deal with the life-changing transformation by one that ultimately affects them all. Ray (Elle Fanning) is a teenager who knows he's a boy, even though he was assigned female at birth. Ray has already been living as a boy for years, but is now ready to start hormone replacement therapy. His single mother, Maggie (Naomi Watts), must track down Ray's biological father (Tate Donovan) to get his legal consent to allow Ray's transition.

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A female gunslinger arrives in a small town determined to settle an old score.

programme.title: Starship Troopers: Traitor of Mars
programme.desc: A distant Federation outpost Fort Casey comes under attack by bugs. The team on the fast attack ship Alesia is assigned to help the Starship John A. Warden stationed in Fort Casey evacuate along with the survivors and bring military intelligence safely back to Earth. Carl Jenkins, now ministry of Paranormal Warfare, takes the starship on a clandestine mission before its rendezvous with the Alesia and goes missing in the nebula. Now, the battle-hardened troopers are charged with a rescue mission that may lead to a much more sinister consequence than they ever could have imagined...

programme.title: Residen Evil: Retribution
programme.desc: Alice fights alongside a resistance movement to regain her freedom from an Umbrella Corporation testing facility. A sequel to Resident Evil: Afterlife 3D.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon.

programme.title: Murphy's Romance
programme.desc: Sometimes before you can fall in love, you need a little push.

programme.title: Vibes (1988)
programme.desc: A pair of mismatched psychics are thrown together on a mysterious mission in South America.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Featuring a fine ensemble cast including Demi Moore, Rob Lowe, Emilio Estevez and Andrew McCarthy, ST. ELMO'S FIRE follows the adventures of a group of friends in the years after their graduation from Georgetown University.

programme.title: Sheena
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this fun-filled action-adventure.

programme.title: August
programme.desc: ‘Wall Street', ‘Boiler Room' and ‘Shattered Glass' come crashing into the Internet Age in this intense, edge-of-your-seat and emotional tale about one man's fight to keep his dreams alive during the dot-com collapse of 2001. Meet Tom Sterling (Josh Hartnett), CEO of Landshark, a revolutionary new dotcom company that's going to make him a millionaire many times over. That is, if it can stay afloat long enough to get out of stock market ‘lock-up'.

programme.title: To Write Love on Her Arms
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this musical drama tells the story of how artistic fantasy, music and friendships helped teenager Renee embark on a courageous journey towards recovery.

programme.title: Fighting Demons
programme.desc: Ex-boxer and former alcoholic, Vian, just got out of prison after serving time for a fatal accident and is desperate for a fresh start. He moves in with his sister Bethley and her young son, Jimmy, with the understanding that he will not drink at all. When Vian meets and begins dating the beautiful, successful Jolene, for the first time he knows love and commitment through his family and his new relationship. However, when an unfortunate accident jeopardizes the new life Vian has created, he must decide if he will revert back to the thug he once was or fight for the people he's grown to love.

programme.title: Where hands touch
programme.desc: In 1944, a 15-year-old girl, daughter of a white German mother and a black African father, meets a member of the Hitler Youth. They become bound by the realization of the horrors being committed around them.

programme.title: Incoming
programme.desc: The International Space Station is now a prison - the ultimate black site. No one's getting out. And no one knows it's there. But when the imprisoned terrorists take over the Station and turn it into a missile aimed at Moscow, only a shuttle pilot and a rookie doctor can stop them. Their task is complicated by a rogue CIA agent who has his own plans for the station and the terrorists within.

programme.title: The Tracker
programme.desc: Ten years ago, Aiden Hakansson's wife and daughter were kidnapped and killed in Italy during an exchange of prisoners gone wrong. Since then, Aiden has been living in the USA, isolated from the world, woken every night by nightmares and memories. He has lost all hope, when he receives a call from Italy someone asks to meet him to supply decisive information on the killing. Aiden doesn't hesitate: he leaves immediately for Italy, Taranto, driven only by the thought of revenge.

programme.title: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: During some extensive renovations on an eight-storey office building, a major gas leak leads to a terrible explosion, trapping the injured staff in a fiery maze. Can the brave firefighters provide a safe exit from this deadly inferno?

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: Paul Walker plays Nolan Hayes, the father of a child born prematurely in New Orleans just before the onset of Hurricane Katrina. With his wife having died in childbirth, Nolan is plunged, alone, into a desperate fight to save his newborn baby's life as the city crumbles around him...

programme.title: Horse Power: American Legacies
programme.desc: American horses are icons. Mustang. Morgan. Appaloosa. Quarter Horse. Even their names suggest a timeless power. Horsepower that shaped a nation. A nation whose demands shaped them. Each has a unique story to tell. Born of legendary historical moments, charismatic figures, and singular places, HORSE POWER takes us on a journey tracing the emergence of these breeds over time. But the work to understand, create, and maintain their legacies is not over. Today's horse trainers are as diverse as the horses they care for. Their passion is unbridled – for they continue in the long tradition of innovation and husbandry that is now part of the very fabric of America.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: What seems calm and tranquil may not necessarily be so. Under the tranquility there maybe a vibrant dynamic world and above water there maybe dangers which are lurking at very corner.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In 'Return Of The Giants' we'll follow the journeys of these magnificent animals, from their feeding grounds to their breeding grounds, the tender moments between mother and calf, and see the dangers their calves face in their first few months

programme.title: Hummingbirds: Jewelled Messengers
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes us into the remarkable lives of hummingbirds via stunning slow motion photography. Everything about these tiny birds is superb and extreme. They have the highest metabolism, fastest heart beat and most rapid wing beat in the avian world.

programme.title: Lions Rule
programme.desc: On the African plains lions rule. They're not the biggest or fastest animals around, but stealth, teamwork and the strength of the pride means they almost always come out on top.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: What seems calm and tranquil may not necessarily be so. Under the tranquility there maybe a vibrant dynamic world and above water there maybe dangers which are lurking at very corner.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês is the only national park in Portugal. An area of almost 700 square kilometers, located in the extreme north of Portugal. Barren and rocky ridges in the plateaus, contrast with large forests and lush ground vegetation in deep valleys, crossed by lakes and rivers. The park is known for its oak forests, which are predominantly pedunculate and Pyrenean oaks. Among the typical animals of the park are the small Garrano ponies, a very old breed of horse and the only one in Europe that still lives in the wild.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The "Parque Natural da Ria Formosa" is one of the largest lagoon conservation areas in Europe. Bordered by five natural islands. A mosaic of sandbanks, brackish and freshwater lagoons and salt marshes. In 2010, the "Ria Formosa" was chosen as one of the seven natural wonders of Portugal. It is a unique ecosystem: in the winter months, more than 20,000 birds gather here. In addition, the nature park has one of the largest seahorse populations internationally. More than half of all fish species in the Atlantic are said to spawn in the lagoon.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The highest mountain range in Portugal is the Serra da Estrela. The episode embarks on a voyage of discovery to adventurous rock formations and villages steeped in tradition. The nature park is the largest protected area on the Iberian peninsula. In the mountain range we accompany the young scientist Ana Matos, who wants to breathe new life into old traditions, and cheese maker Maria Natália Lopes. She watches over more than 350 sheeps.

programme.title: The Incredible Five
programme.desc: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah. Few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes. But on occasion, the predatory cats reveal their surprisingly different side. In the Northern Serengeti, a group of male cheetahs emerges and turns all we know about them upside down. Males are usually loners or live in small groups, but here we have five tomcats hunting together as one. It is actually, the largest alliance of the animals ever seen! This film has many stories to tell about the sleek hunters.

programme.title: Zoo Babies: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: We find out about the sweetest and most poignant animal baby stories. Whether on land, under water or in the sky - all of the babies in this series will conquer the hearts of all those watching. We accompany the adventures of the animal babies - lovingly cared for and brought up by their keepers. In the most gripping and informative way, both young and old will discover everything there is to know about Hamburg Zoo's toddlers.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: An hour's drive from Johannesburg Warren is raising three cheetah cubs at the Lion and Cheetah Sanctuary. They are an endangered species – not only in South Africa but around the world. Warren is taking the three orphaned siblings for walks on a daily basis to give them the opportunity to experience being outside their enclosure. This is part of the preparation for their return to the wild. Convincing them to leave the enclosure is easy, trying to get them back in is a difficult task to undertake. In the South African Limpopo province, we meet clinic manager Nikita at the Moholoholo Animal Rehabilitation Centre. She's taking care of several different animals all of whom got their own sad story. One of them is a female honey badger who recently lost her cub post-partum. She is mothering a chain as a substitute for her cub so Nikita is trying to help her getting through this difficult phase. She is also monitoring vultures who have fallen victim to poisoning. And she introduces Havana to us - a juvenile caracal who was found abandoned in a hotel. She has obviously been raised by humans as she was found clinging to a milk bottle. In our highlight story we travel to Crag's View Wild Care Centre in Port Edwards along the south coast of Kwa-Zulu Natal. Here we meet Craig and a partially blind blue duiker. Craig didn't have high hopes for the antelope to survive, as she has been attacked by a large cat. But thanks to the passionate caretaker the bubbly animal is doing great today.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.sub-title: Wild Dog, Owls, Bat Eared Foxes
programme.desc: At the Loebis Predator Park in Bela-Bella, a town in the South African Limpopo region, caretaker Annel is looking after orphaned animal babys. Part of her gang of little rascals are a wild dog puppy and a porcupine – both two months old – who have an unlikely friendship and team up against a greedy little predator who likes to steel their food – a same-aged lion cub. But in the end, all of them get along very well – even with the cheeky little mongooses. The highlight of our visit there is the birth of two new members of this unusual family. We also meet Deidre Joubert at the Wild and Free Wildlife Rehabilitation Centre in Mpumalanga who takes care of young barn owls and prepares a bunch of them for their return to the wild. The first step of this process is a release into a bigger enclosure, in which they will stay for seven days, before they finally get back to their natural environment. In our highlight story, we meet sister and brother team Chriszanne and Nicol Burger at the Felidae Wildlife Centre just outside a town called Kimberley in the South African province of Northern Cape. Their focus is on rescued wild cats of all sizes but they also take care for a family of bat-eared foxes – a very intelligent and brash species.

programme.title: Raising Wildlife
programme.desc: In the Wokutakula Wildlife Rescue Centre located in Brits, 85 kilometres north of Johannesburg animal caretaker Juan is looking after a partially blind juvenile Tiger called Felix. Juan rescued the exotic animal just moments before it was going to be traded overseas. He tried to treat the tiger's eye condition but so far, his efforts were unsuccessful. There is no hope for Felix to be returned to the wild, but she has adapted to her new life – thanks to other Tigers, who accompany her and Juan, who sheperds her as good as he can. In the province of Limpopo, we meet Laita at the Moholoholo Animal Rehabilitation Centre. She takes care of two precious juveniles: a Black Leopard and a Serval. The Black Leopard was raised by humans and didn't get the right nutrition, so he was stunted in growth. Therefore, it wouldn't have any chance to survive in the wild. Laita oversees his rehabilitation and the young animal makes great strides. The Serval is the only survivor of four abandoned kittens that got rescued. He also comes along very well and is developing essential skills. For our highlight story we travel to the Mankwe Wildlife Reserve, where Dougal and Lynn are monitoring young and juvenile animals. Spotting giraffes and rhinos isn't easy but it's a rewarding task.

programme.title: Wildlife Nannies: Wildlife Nannies: Baboon Mother
programme.desc: Baboon Mother: In South Africa, 76-yr. old Rita Miljo is raising the tiny baboon baby Rosie as if it were her own. As Rosie grows bigger and stronger, Rita takes her to a “baboon kindergarten”, where she is to form a new troop with others. We also witness Rita and her team releasing a troop of grown baboons into the wild. Wombat Baby Mater: Shaun Douglas of “Something Wild Wildlife Sanctuary” in Tasmania has become a surrogate “mom” to the tiny wombat Mater. As little wombats cling to their mothers for many months in their early lives, Shaun takes Mater with him wherever he goes – even to the shower and to bed!
